raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad weens Pratweets/jeb
weens Sapnotajs starp
tewun zettahs/ un dohd
tew kahdu Sihnut jeb Brihnumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Sihme/jeb tas Brih-
nums nahk/ ko wiꞥſch us tew bij
runnajs/ jazzidams: Laid mehs
zitteem Deeweem pakatdsenna-
mees/ ko mehs ne effam pasinnu-
schi/ un teem kalpojam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tew ne buhs klaufiht
ta paſcha Praweescha Wahr-
deem/ jeb ta paſcha Sapnotaja/ jo
tas KUNGS juhsfu Deews pahr-
banda juhs/ ka tas atsiht warr/
arrig juhs to KUNGII juhsfu
Deewu miblejat no wiﬀas juhsas
Sirđs/ un no wiﬀas juhsas
Dwehfeles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tam KUNGAM juhsam
Deewam buhs jums pakatdsih-
tees/un wiﬀu bihtees/ un wiﬀam
Bautlus buhs jums turreht/ un
wiﬀam Balkfnei klaufiht/ un wi-
xam kalpoht/ un wiﬀam pee-
kehrttees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tam pattim Prawee-
fcham/ jeb tam pattim Sapnota-
jam buhs nokautam tapt/ tapehz
ka wiꞥſch mahzijs irr akkahpt no
ta KUNGA juhsfu Deewa/ kas
juhs no Egiptes-Semmes irr is-
weddıs/ un no ta Wehrgu-Nam-
ma atpestijis/ nodsihdains tew
no ta Zelta/ ko tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew irr paiwehlejs
eekſch ta staigaht/ ta buhs tew to
faunu no tawa Widdus atxeint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad taws Brahlis/ taws
Mahtes Dehls/ jeb taws Dehls/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "jeb tawa Meita/ jeb ta Seewa ta-
wâ Klehpi/ jeb taws Draugs/ ko
tu ta ka tawu Dwehseli turri/ tew
pasleppent pahrrunnahs/ un faz-
zihs : Einna/ kalpojam zitteem
Deeweem/ ko neds tu effi pasin-
nis/ neds tawi Tehwi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No to Lauschn Deeweem/
kas apkahrt jums irr/ tuwu jeb
tabtu no tew/ no weena Sem-
mes Galla lihds ohtram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ne dohd wiﬀam Wak-
tu/ un ne klaufi wiﬀam/ un ta-
wai Azzi ne buhs wiﬀu taupiht/
nn tew ne buhs pahr wiﬀu ap-
schehlotecs/ neds wiﬀu paslehpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kantin nokan wiﬀu/
tawa Rohka laid piruak prett
wiﬀu irr nokaut/ un pehz to
wiﬀu Lauschn Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ar Akmixeem buhs to no-
mehtaht/ ka tas mirst/ jo wiﬀsch
mekleja tew nodsht no ta KUN-
GA tawa Deewa/ kas tew no
Egiptes-Semmes no to Wehr-
gu-Namma isweddis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka wiﬀs Israels to dsird/
un bihstahs/ un ne darra wairs
pehz scho faunu Darbu tawa
Widdit.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu no jeb kahda tawa
Pilsfahta/ko tas KUNGStaws
Deews tew dohd tur dsihwodt/
dsirdesi/ ka fazzihts tehpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wihti/ Beliala Behrni
irr no tawas Widdus isgahju-
schi/ un pahrrunnajscht tawa Pils-
fahta Gedsihwotajus/ jazzidami:
Eima/kalpojam zitteem Deeweem/
ko juhs ne effat pasinnuschi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
